description.overview: A striking black and white setter-type, the Large Münsterländer is a versatile hunting dog that excels at pointing and retrieving. They're devoted family dogs.
description.history: The Large Münsterländer originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, loyal, cheerful.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, dense, with feathering coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A striking black and white setter-type, the Large Münsterländer is a versatile hunting dog that excels at pointing and retrieving. They're devoted family dogs.
